title: Align Systemkatalog learning roles
goal: Move the active evidence-learning relation from retired Heimlern to Vibe-Lab while keeping Chronik as append-only historical truth and Bureau as decision owner.

acceptance.assertion: Heimlern has no active learning truth ownership and is described as a retained historical reference.
Chronik may provide frozen historical evidence to Vibe-Lab with no automatic policy or task application.
Vibe-Lab may export reviewed proposal candidates while Bureau remains the sole task decision owner.

acceptance_evidence.heimlern-retired: Current Systemkatalog main describes repo:heimlern as an archived historical reference, gives it an empty truthOwnership list, and explicitly excludes active learning proposals and runtime operation.
acceptance_evidence.chronik-vibe-relation: Current Systemkatalog main contains repo:chronik -> repo:vibe-lab learning_input_for with bounded semantics: frozen historical outcome cohorts are evidence for prospectively registered experiments and no policy or task is auto-applied.
acceptance_evidence.vibe-bureau-relation: Current Systemkatalog main contains repo:vibe-lab -> repo:bureau exports_candidate_to; reviewed proposal-ready candidates may be exported, while Bureau alone decides whether they become work.

metadata.outcome: Systemkatalog PR #131 implemented the Chronik/Vibe-Lab/Bureau learning-role boundary and was merged on 2026-07-14. Current main 7447da1f9b481d31fecd28a385ac1c3e27a22bbb still satisfies all three acceptance assertions; later catalog work additionally archives Heimlern explicitly. This closeout reconciles stale Bureau task state only and establishes no runtime integration, effectiveness or automatic task creation.
